title: Lotononis oxyptera
intro: Lotononis oxyptera, also known as the 'water loton,' is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. Research has isolated several bioactive constituents from Lotononis oxyptera, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Lotononis oxyptera is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
